note: First run reported 25 spurious HITs (5 reps x [D + Dp] + 10 pairwise) all from the trivial identity 1+sqrt(5)-2*phi=0 where phi=(1+sqrt(5))/2 was both in the basis and the trap. Caught by inspecting relation L-coefficient (=0). Corrected by removing phi from bases D/Dp/E and adding an explicit L-coefficient!=0 filter in try_pslq. Same class of error as the zeta(2)=pi^2/6 trap from T2A-DEGREE42-DEEP-VALIDATE.
